title: The Last Frontier
writer: Courtney Ryley Cooper, Will M. Ritchey
actors: William Boyd, Marguerite De La Motte, Jack Hoxie
plot: Impoverished by the Civil War and eager to replenish his fortune in the West, Colonel Halliday, his wife, and his daughter, Beth, proceed toward Salina, Kansas by wagon train, at the persuasion of Tom Kirby, a government scout and...
